input.notes: Entry point of the model. No inputs allowed. Connect FROM input TO the first processing layer.
input.common_fix: Input should be the first node. Connect input -> embedding/conv2d/first_layer.

output.notes: Final output node. Only ONE input allowed. Must be the last node in the chain.
output.common_fix: If you need to merge multiple branches, use concat/residual_add/merge BEFORE output, then connect that merge node -> output.

embedding.notes: Token embedding layer. Single input (from input node or positional encoding).
embedding.common_fix: Connect input -> embedding. For residual streams, branch AFTER embedding.

attention.common_fix: Connect from previous layer. For multi-branch attention, use separate attention blocks.

mha.common_fix: Same as attention - single input stream.

gqa.common_fix: Efficient attention variant. Single input stream.

layernorm.common_fix: If merging multiple streams, use concat/residual_add BEFORE layernorm.

ffn.common_fix: Standard transformer FFN. Single input stream.

conv2d.common_fix: For parallel convolutions, use separate conv2d blocks then merge with concat.

flatten.common_fix: Single input. Used before dense layers.

dense.common_fix: Single input. For merging branches, use concat first.

global_pool.common_fix: Single input. Used before classification head.

lm_head.notes: Language model head. Can accept multiple inputs (from different expert branches).
lm_head.common_fix: Fan-in capable. Can merge multiple expert outputs.

residual.notes: Residual/skip connection. Can merge multiple inputs (main + skip).
residual.common_fix: Connect main path and skip path INTO residual, then output goes to next layer.

residual_add.notes: Add residual connection. Can merge multiple inputs.
residual_add.common_fix: Fan-in capable. Use to combine skip connections with main path.

skip_connection.notes: Skip connection block. Can merge multiple inputs.

concat.common_fix: Use concat to merge parallel branches (e.g., Inception-style multi-branch).

merge.notes: Generic merge block. Unlimited inputs. Combines multiple streams.
merge.common_fix: Fan-in capable. Use when you need to combine multiple outputs into one stream.

add.notes: Element-wise addition. Can merge multiple inputs.
add.common_fix: Fan-in capable. Used for residual connections.

gate.notes: Router/Gate for MoE. Can accept multiple inputs.
gate.common_fix: Fan-in capable. Routes tokens to experts.

expert.notes: Expert FFN in MoE. Single input from router.
expert.common_fix: Each expert receives routed tokens. Single input.

moe_block.notes: Complete MoE block with routing. Fan-in capable.
moe_block.common_fix: Handles routing internally. Can accept multiple inputs.

router_softmax.notes: Softmax router for MoE. Fan-in capable.
router_softmax.common_fix: Computes routing weights. Can accept multiple inputs.

output_combination.notes: Output combination for MoE. Fan-in capable.
output_combination.common_fix: Combines expert outputs into final output.

mamba_block.common_fix: State space model block. Single input stream.

s4_block.notes: S4 state space block. Single input.

bilstm.common_fix: Processes forward and backward. Single input.

global_mean_pool.notes: Global mean pooling for graphs. Single input.

timestep_embedding.notes: Timestep embedding for diffusion. Single input.

residual_block.common_fix: Contains internal skip connection. Single external input.

unet_block.notes: U-Net block with skip connections. Fan-in capable.
unet_block.common_fix: Can merge encoder and decoder paths.

custom.notes: Custom block. Fan-in capable by default.

transformer_layer.notes: Complete transformer layer (attention + FFN). Single input.
transformer_layer.common_fix: Stack multiple transformer_layer blocks in sequence. Single input each.
